Type Alias# FFEffectParameterFlag

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
typealias FFEffectParameterFlag = UInt32
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffeffectparameterflag#Discussion)

Effect Parameter flags for use in calls to **FFEffectGetParameters()** and **FFEffectSetParameters()**.
